creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Can you be a bit more detailed in what you're doing? I tried the following:

- right click on the background (wallpaper)
- from the pop-up menu, choose "add widgets"
- a big box of widgets shows up
- type "co" (I think that's what you mean with "search alphabetically") and the list is filtered to include only those widgets containing "co" in their description

It doesn't crash here, *but* then I'm on 13.1, and not intel graphics.
